steps.title: Express A in two ways using the given percentages
steps.content:
Convert the given percentages to equations:
  • Mass of A is 384% of B gives $A = 3.84B$
  • Mass of A is 0.048% of C gives $A = 0.00048C$

steps.title: Set the expressions equal and solve for C in terms of B
steps.content:
Since both expressions equal $A$, equate them:
$$3.84B = 0.00048C$$
Divide both sides by $0.00048$:
$$C = \frac{3.84B}{0.00048}$$
Simplifying the coefficient: $\frac{3.84}{0.00048} = 8000$, so $C = 8000B$.

steps.title: Convert to percentage form and calculate p/1000
steps.content:
Since $C = 8000B$, the mass of $C$ is $800,000\%$ of the mass of $B$ (since $8000 \times 100\% = 800,000\%$). Thus $p = 800,000$. Therefore:
$$\frac{p}{1000} = \frac{800000}{1000} = 800$$
